brief.targetAudience: people looking for healthier vegan protein powder

concepts.headline: Protein Without the Bloat
concepts.primary_text: Most vegan proteins cause digestive issues. EcoProtein's water lentil powder is different — clean, complete & gut-friendly.
concepts.visual_description: The EcoProtein bottle is centered on a clean white marble surface with soft natural daylight casting a gentle shadow to the right. A small handful of raw water lentils is scattered organically beside the bottle to visually connect ingredient to product. The overall mood is minimal, clinical-clean, and trustworthy — no clutter, pale green accent tones from the label anchor the composition.
concepts.rationale: Directly addresses the #1 pain point vegan protein seekers have with competing products, making EcoProtein feel like the rational, researched solution for a health-conscious audience.

concepts.headline: Protein From Water Plants?
concepts.primary_text: Water lentils are the world's fastest-growing plant protein. EcoProtein harnesses it — sustainably, cleanly, completely.
concepts.visual_description: The EcoProtein bottle stands upright on a dark, deep forest-green matte surface, lit by a single soft overhead spotlight that highlights the label's texture and makes the product the undeniable hero. A shallow pool of still water with a few floating micro-green lentil leaves surrounds the base of the bottle, creating an intriguing, nature-meets-science mood. The contrast between the dark background and the bright label gives the shot a premium, editorial quality.
concepts.rationale: The unexpected ingredient origin sparks curiosity and drives stop-the-scroll behavior, making awareness-stage viewers want to investigate a genuinely novel product story.

concepts.headline: The Cleanest Vegan Protein
concepts.primary_text: No fillers. No artificial flavors. Just 22g of complete plant protein per serving. EcoProtein — backed by science, built for you.
concepts.visual_description: The EcoProtein bottle is photographed straight-on against a pure off-white background with soft, diffused studio lighting that eliminates harsh shadows and renders every label detail with crisp clarity. A subtle embossed-style text overlay reading '100% Plant-Based | No Fillers | Complete Amino Profile' floats in clean sans-serif type beside the bottle. The composition is symmetrical and precise, projecting scientific credibility and brand confidence.
concepts.rationale: A no-nonsense, specification-led visual paired with authority language builds immediate trust with ingredient-savvy vegan shoppers who scrutinize labels before buying.
